case_title: MATTHEW RICHARD CARRICO VS. DAWIT GEBREMEDHIN

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARRICO, MATTHEW RICHARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GEBREMEDHIN, DAWIT $5,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,700.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
